loop_start.reason: Compiler loops start from source refs and build handoffs, not prior loop chat memory.
evidence: new session id or recorded context reset

validation.reason: Documentation validation must judge durable task/sprint contract independently.

next_loop.reason: Planning should consume documentation build and task context.
evidence: new session id or recorded context reset

requirements.text: Tasks are self-contained executable work, not grouping units.

summary: Documented task/sprint boundary contract and validation blocking policy for container tasks.
knowledge_changes: Added durable task boundary contract: tasks are self-contained executable work; sprints are related-task clusters.
Added validation-gateway rule to block container/umbrella tasks and overlapping ownership without split rationale.
Updated implementation/resume skill guidance to stop on container tasks and route grouping to sprint/planning.
roadmap_changes: Cancelled TASK-077 as superseded by SPRINT-003 because it was a container task.
Created TASK-089 for concrete enforcement work.
Updated SPRINT-003 membership to remove TASK-077 and include TASK-089.
